answers.question: How would you like to proceed?
Any feedback or changes needed?
answers.custom_answer:
[Line 92]: visible stages will be: Agua, Wood, Stone, Gold, Microchip

[Line 112]: We will also need to generate high-quality images of the laurel on a transparent background. The twist is that we will depict the laurel as a seagull dressed as a parrot, not as a parrot itself. It should be funny. Let’s generate several poses or positions of the seagull dressed as a parrot for different screens illustrating something. Make sure that the full seagull's body fits the screen, not just the portrait head or whatever. It must be always with legs, like full body with legs, head with everything.

[Line 114]: agua, wood, stone, gold, microchip
